novel_features.name: Daily Agenda
novel_features.description: Unified chronological day view merging calendar events and due tasks across all connected accounts.
novel_features.rationale: No single Morgen endpoint returns events and tasks together. agenda auto-discovers connected calendars, fans out /events/list across them for the chosen day, joins in /tasks/list items due that day, and sorts everything into one timeline — the view a daily planner actually needs.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Reach for this to see everything on a day in one call instead of querying events per calendar and tasks separately.
